why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, Codeberg adoption is flat, Reddit is structurally suspended in this runtime, Apollo is already inside a measurement window until 2026-05-30, and AgentLocker exposed a fresh high-fit directory contact path that was still untouched. That made a Codeberg-first curator contact attempt the strongest executable move right now.
shared_findings_reused: MARKETING_SELF_IMPROVEMENT.md: ship a real tactic instead of another audit-only pass
MARKETING_WORKFLOW_PRINCIPLES.md: keep Codeberg primary and prefer proof-led distribution
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserved what it is, who it is for, why different, and why now
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: bias toward free-use proof and repo-directed conversion
market_intelligence_latest.json: reused current positioning truths and comparison-aware framing
reddit_post_analysis.md: Reddit remains a low-value lane right now because of structural repetition and runtime constraints
distribution_reset_execution_log.md: curator/directory inclusion remains the live replacement lane

verification.verification_note: POST returned HTTP 200 from the live contact endpoint after a valid CSRF-backed form submission. The page did not expose a clean machine-readable success object, so the best same-run confirmation is accepted POST + returned contact page with success markers present.

measurement_window.success_signal: reply from AgentLocker, live directory inclusion, or any new third-party citation/backlink that sends evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by 2026-06-06, replace this lane with a different untouched curator/directory target instead of reusing the same contact path.
